name: Cherry Pies
recipeInstructions:
1. Unfold one pie crust and form dough into a 10x10 inch square.
2. Cut the square in half.
3. Place one piece of dough into a sandwich maker.
4. Place 2 tablespoons of cherry pie filling mixture into each triangular pocket.
5. Top with the other half of the pie crust, placing it on top of the pockets and sealing.
6. Lower the lid and secure the latch.
7. Bake for 5-7 minutes or until done.
8. Drizzle with icing.
Variations: Peach, apricot, apple, blueberry, strawberry, or minced meat pie filling.
